scope: Preview, rename, overwrite, apply, and delete for named multi-brigade battle plans
Desktop QA only; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target
flow: Opened app at 1440x900 and reset the campaign.
Clicked 計画セット保存 and verified 戦線計画 1 appeared with 内容確認, 一括適用, 上書き, 名前編集, and 削除.
Clicked 内容確認 and verified preview details for current battlefield, frontline geometry, reserve doctrine, designated reserves, and missing units.
Renamed 戦線計画 1 to 東方標準防衛線 and verified the old name disappeared from the list.
Changed selected brigade posture to 弾性防御 and verified the plan-set preview showed 差分 1.
Clicked 上書き and verified the preview returned to 差分 0 while preserving the custom name.
Changed selected brigade back to 固守, clicked 一括適用, and verified the selected summary restored 姿勢 弾性防御.
Clicked 削除 and verified the empty plan-set copy returned.
Verified localStorage via CDP reported planSetCount 0 after deletion.
observations: The plan-set preview showed 戦場 現主戦場, 戦線 戦区標準, 予備 標準予備, 指定予備 0保存・現行0, and 未投入なし.
Overwrite updates the stored StandingOrders from the current Deployment draft without losing the custom plan-set name.
Delete removes the plan set from persisted storage; the deleted name can still appear temporarily in the campaign message, so storage count is the authoritative deletion check.
notes: Mobile QA was skipped because the current target excludes cellphone/mobile.
